---
title: "About Me"
---

<!-- Education -->
<div class="section-block">
<h2 class="section-title">Education</h2>

<div class="timeline">

<div class="timeline-item">
  <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
  <div class="timeline-content">
    <div class="timeline-header">
      <span class="timeline-degree">M.S. Biostatistics and Bioinformatics</span>
      <span class="timeline-date">2024 — 2026</span>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-place">Emory University, Atlanta, GA</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-item">
  <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
  <div class="timeline-content">
    <div class="timeline-header">
      <span class="timeline-degree">B.S. Mathematics and Statistics</span>
      <span class="timeline-date">2020 — 2024</span>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-place">University of Liverpool, UK</div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
</div>

---

<!-- Research Experience -->
<div class="section-block">
<h2 class="section-title">Research Experience</h2>

<div class="experience-card">
  <div class="experience-header">
    <div>
      <div class="experience-title">Graduate Research Assistant</div>
      <div class="experience-place">Emory CIDMATH, Emory University</div>
    </div>
    <span class="experience-date">2024 — Present</span>
  </div>
  <p class="experience-desc">
    Developing Bayesian hierarchical models in Stan to characterize viral shedding dynamics by integrating heterogeneous longitudinal datasets extracted from 
    published literature using an LLM-powered AI pipeline.
  </p>
  <div class="experience-tags">
    <span class="tag-skill">Stan</span>
    <span class="tag-skill">Bayesian Modeling</span>
    <span class="tag-skill">R</span>
    <span class="tag-skill">LLM Pipeline</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="experience-card">
  <div class="experience-header">
    <div>
      <div class="experience-title">Graduate Research Assistant</div>
      <div class="experience-place">Goizueta Brain Health Institute, Emory University</div>
    </div>
    <span class="experience-date">2025 — Present</span>
  </div>
  <p class="experience-desc">
    Analyzing resting-state EEG biomarkers to differentiate MCI from Alzheimer's 
    Disease using spectral power, wavelet coherence, and complexity features.
  </p>
  <div class="experience-tags">
    <span class="tag-skill">EEG Analysis</span>
    <span class="tag-skill">R Shiny</span>
    <span class="tag-skill">plotly</span>
    <span class="tag-skill">Signal Processing</span>
  </div>
</div>

</div>

---

<!-- Skills -->
<div class="section-block">
<h2 class="section-title">Skills</h2>

<div class="skills-grid">
  <div class="skill-group">
    <div class="skill-group-title">Programming</div>
    <div class="skill-bars">
      <div class="skill-bar-item">
        <span class="skill-name">R</span>
        <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" style="width:90%"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-bar-item">
        <span class="skill-name">Python</span>
        <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" style="width:80%"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-bar-item">
        <span class="skill-name">SQL</span>
        <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" style="width:65%"></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-group">
    <div class="skill-group-title">Tools & Frameworks</div>
    <div class="skill-badges">
      <span class="tag-skill">ggplot2</span>
      <span class="tag-skill">plotly</span>
      <span class="tag-skill">Shiny</span>
      <span class="tag-skill">Stan</span>
      <span class="tag-skill">R Markdown</span>
      <span class="tag-skill">LaTeX</span>
      <span class="tag-skill">GitHub</span>
      <span class="tag-skill">flexdashboard</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>

---

<!-- Contact -->
<div class="section-block">
<h2 class="section-title">Contact</h2>
<div class="contact-row">
  <a href="https://github.com/hww228" class="contact-chip" target="_blank">
    GitHub
  </a>
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/youwei-hu-62744b30b/" class="contact-chip" target="_blank">
    LinkedIn
  </a>
  <a href="mailto:youwei.hu@emory.edu" class="contact-chip">
    youwei.hu@emory.edu
  </a>
</div>
</div>
